notes.text: We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit
We've optimized the use of sideEffects when executing actions on multiple rows
We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
You can now define formatOptions for all fields of a column in the Table building block
You can now set up navigation to a specific section of an object page
